brief_justification: Correctly concludes No with valid, multi-layered reasoning across 7 distinct assumption failures; traces second-order effects like sequence risk and real vs nominal confusion at three levels of depth; injects its own reasoning context and flags assumption categories but does not explicitly name biases it might hold; verifies arithmetic independently ($3.16M check) and sanity-checks via inflation conversion to $1.2M real; clearly distinguishes axioms from derived beliefs using category labels (Unverified, False, Misleading) and confidence distinctions; identifies failure modes of the projection but does not present or reject alternative retirement planning frameworks; every conclusion has an explicit derivation a third party could reproduce, including the real-return recalculation; avoids the anti-pattern of accepting inherited beliefs but does not explicitly name the negative gate pattern or explain why it fails; zero evidence of hidden_assumption_acceptance or model_confidence_inflation, and explicitly injects suppress signals from the payload; follows S1 decompose, G1 axiom-or-derived gate, and FLAG steps from the topology but does not show explicit graph branching or loop/gate labeling in the prose.
